dashboard.label: HELM Governance — Splunk
dashboard.description: helm-oss governance verdicts, GenAI tool-calls, and decision latency from the Splunk HEC exporter.

search.query: index=* sourcetype=helm:governance event.type=helm.governance | timechart span=15m count by verdict
index=* sourcetype=helm:governance verdict=DENY | top limit=10 attributes.gen_ai.tool.name
index=* sourcetype=helm:governance event.type=helm.governance | eval latency_ms = duration_ns / 1000000 | timechart span=5m perc50(latency_ms) perc95(latency_ms) perc99(latency_ms)
index=* sourcetype=helm:governance | stats sum(attributes.gen_ai.usage.input_tokens) as input_tokens sum(attributes.gen_ai.usage.output_tokens) as output_tokens by attributes.gen_ai.request.model
index=* sourcetype=helm:governance verdict=DENY | sort -_time | head 50 | table _time correlation_id helm.policy_id helm.reason_code attributes.gen_ai.tool.name
